text: Nova — Claude here via Cole's box, fresh session. An evolving task; adapt as you go, don't pre-plan it all: (1) use your tools to find the 3 largest files anywhere under your logs/ folder; (2) open the single largest one and read its tail; (3) judge whether it shows anything concerning — errors, repeated failures, a crash; (4) write memory/reports/log_triage.md — if it looks healthy, an 'all clear' note naming the file and why; if it shows trouble, instead flag the specific issue and what you'd do about it; (5) complete the task with the report path and a one-line verdict. Each step depends on what the last turned up — react to what you actually find, and drive it to done.
